sourcePolicy.primaryMetricSource: Clarivate Journal Citation Reports profile PDF and profile URL

fieldRules.currentImpactFactorAndJcrQuartile: Use the row-specific source URL; bestQuartile is the best (highest) quartile among all listed JCR categories.
fieldRules.fiveYearImpactFactorJciAndCategoryRank: Use the row-specific source URL recorded in each metric entry.
fieldRules.lastResortCurrentImpactFactor: JournalSearches may fill missing JIF values.
fieldRules.quartileSeparation: JournalSearches quartiles are stored as Scopus quartiles and never treated as JCR quartiles.

sourcePolicy.note: JIF, JCR categories, and JIF quartiles for all 22 journals were verified against user-provided Clarivate JCR profile PDFs on 2026-07-17. The PDFs do not display 5-year JIF, so fiveYearImpactFactor remains secondary-source data.
